_meta.description: Informed Republic — Members of Congress directory
_meta.notes: Photo paths are relative to /assets/photos/members/. District is null for Senate members. years_served is the year the member was first sworn in. Committees lists full committee assignments only (not subcommittees). Refresh each new Congress and after special elections or resignations.
